entities.name: V
entities.context: User whose fitness logging system is being described

entities.name: Workout Logging System
entities.context: Structured system for logging exercise sessions with RPE, sets, reps, and modifications

entities.name: RPE Scale
entities.context: Rate of Perceived Exertion scale (1-10) used to track workout intensity

entities.name: Ramp Week 1
entities.context: A phase in V's training program (ramp_week1), likely an introductory/ramping intensity period

entities.name: Upper Circuit
entities.context: Upper body workout session type within V's training program

entities.name: Core Work
entities.context: Core-focused workout session type within V's training program

entities.name: Push-ups
entities.context: Exercise in upper circuit, programmed at 2×8 reps

entities.name: Dead Bugs
entities.context: Core exercise programmed at 1×8 per side, appears in both upper and core sessions

entities.name: Bird Dogs
entities.context: Core exercise programmed at 1×6 per side, appears in both upper and core sessions

entities.name: Pull Aparts
entities.context: Exercise in upper circuit, programmed at 1×12 reps

entities.name: Bent Over Rows
entities.context: Exercise in upper circuit, skippable when back discomfort present

entities.name: Confirm-Before-Write Pattern
entities.context: Logging system always asks for confirmation before finalizing entries

relationships.context: V uses a structured natural-language-to-structured-log workout tracking system
V tracks perceived exertion on a 1-10 scale for each session
RPE is a required field in every logged session
Push-ups are a component exercise of the upper circuit
Dead bugs are a component exercise of the upper circuit
Bird dogs are a component exercise of the upper circuit
Pull aparts are a component exercise of the upper circuit
Bent over rows are a component exercise of the upper circuit
Dead bugs are a component of standalone core sessions
Bird dogs are a component of standalone core sessions
System always presents parsed log and asks for confirmation before writing
Upper circuit session is part of the ramp_week1 training phase
Core session is part of the ramp_week1 training phase
V is currently in or has documented the ramp_week1 phase of training
